title: taraxacum albiflos
intro: Taraxacum albiflos, also known as the white dandelion or false dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as supporting digestive health, reducing inflammation, and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Taraxacum albiflos can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried roots and leaves.
